text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Today brings me to the Arima Kinen<n>and the final
showdown against the<n>Golden Generation.
Donning the aura<n>of a ruler, I take the stage.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
All are left nearly speechless in awe<n>of my spirit.
They manage only to<n>utter, "She is the mighty
king."

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Today might just become Coronation<n>Day of the
Centurial Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: Now, ladies and gentlemen! This isthe finale to Origins of the CenturialOverlord!
